calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey for Robert Imbellino (Petitioner).

The Court indicated that the problem is the language in the Trust is not clear. Counsel presented oral argument to support her position with regard to the intent of the Trustor to have all the assets in the Trust. The Court stated that the assets were not titled in the Trust and the Petition for Order confirming Trust Property is denied.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Property
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Continued To Jan-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey and Jenny Sweetland for Petitioner.

Ms. Sweetland stated that she has a declaration from her Client that it was the Trustor's intent to place all of their assets in the Trust, that titles of the accounts are also in the declaration and that for the most part the accounts were held jointly. Ms. Sweetland also stated the stocks are held jointly in both names, that nothing has been changed in the accounts and that the Decedent's name is still on the accounts. Ms. Carey stated that the stocks are in certificates and that all of the accounts are community property. The Court indicated that it was bothered by the language on schedule-A and that it would be helpful to see the last statements before the Decedent's death to see how the accounts were titled. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Property was continued to January 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing a further declaration and copies of the statements which are to be filed by December 30, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clarke. (Not Reported)
